model_formula: Welch one-way ANOVA: Final Test Score ~ Condition, var.equal = FALSE
contrast_direction: Experiment 1 final test performance differs across one quiz, two quizzes, three quizzes, and mastery quizzing
extraction_note: Recomputed from the author's Experiment 1 cleaned data file with failed-mastery participants and timed-out participants removed. The analysis uses only Condition and Final Test Score; additional summary columns in the CSV are ignored. Welch's one-way ANOVA gives F(3, 79.568551) = 35.642056, p = 1.05266e-14. Omega squared is computed from the ordinary one-way ANOVA sums of squares, matching the article's reported omega2. Group summaries: one: n=38, M=7.447368, SD=1.703690; two: n=40, M=6.575000, SD=1.795828; three: n=38, M=7.105263, SD=2.251600; mastery: n=38, M=9.473684, SD=1.006381. Reported BF10 = 2.06e8 is retained as article metadata but is not recomputed here.
